features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Ram
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage, or 11 (2d8 + 2) Bludgeoning damage if the seahorse moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

bonus_actions.name: Bubble Dash
bonus_actions.description: While underwater, the seahorse moves up to half its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

tactical_info.combat_role: Charger - Underwater mount with charging ability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Bubble Dash to reposition for charge attacks
tactical_info.key_abilities: Charge bonus damage, Bubble Dash for tactical movement
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent underwater mount, works well with aquatic allies
